description: Easement and Right-of-Way Recording — records easement grants, dedications, vacations, and utility easements with beneficiary and burdened parcel tracking

hard_stops.label: Grantor Does Not Own Burdened Parcel
hard_stops.logic: Grantor of the easement is not the owner of the burdened parcel — cannot grant an easement over property not owned

hard_stops.label: Easement Description Indeterminate
hard_stops.logic: Legal description of the easement area is insufficient to locate the easement on the ground — recording would create title ambiguity

soft_flags.label: Overlapping Easement Exists
soft_flags.logic: A previously recorded easement overlaps with the proposed easement area — verify compatibility of uses
